exec: pm.test("Each event has required properties", function () {
pm.test("No event object contains a description property", function () {
pm.expect(event).to.not.have.property("description", "Event at index " + index + " should not have a description property");
pm.test("Deleted event is not in the array", function () {
// Check if the response status is 200
// Check if the response body contains a specific property

pm.test("All cars are Toyota", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.make === 'Toyota')).to.be.true; });
pm.test("No car is Honda", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.make !== 'Honda')).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have price > 20000", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.price > 20000)).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have modelYear >= 2020", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.modelYear >= 2020)).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have price < 30000", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.price < 30000)).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have modelYear <= 2023", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.modelYear <= 2023)).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have modelYear between 2015 and 2020", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.modelYear >= 2015 && car.modelYear <= 2020)).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have color Red or Blue", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => ['Red','Blue'].includes(car.color))).to.be.true; });
pm.test("No car is Black or White", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => !['Black','White'].includes(car.color))).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have null or empty description", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => !car.description)).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have non-null description", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => !!car.description)).to.be.true; });
pm.test("All cars have model matching *Cam*", function () { pm.expect(data.results.every(car => car.model && car.model.includes('Cam'))).to.be.true; });
